en-US.title: Weathercast — Rain Nowcast
en-US.subtitle: Know when rain reaches you
en-US.description:
Weathercast answers one question clearly: when will rain reach this place?

Choose a place or use foreground location to see rain arrival timing, expected intensity, likely duration, and forecast confidence for the next 120 minutes. Coverage tiers distinguish radar-supported precision from model-based guidance, so the app does not imply unsupported street-level accuracy.

Save places on your device, view the latest radar where available, and schedule local rain reminders without creating an account or enabling background location.

Weathercast is not an emergency-warning or life-safety service. Follow official local alerts.
